diagnoses.name: Digital osteoarthritis (Heberden's / Bouchard's nodes)
diagnoses.source: Magee; hand OA diagnostic criteria (DIP/PIP/thumb-base nodal OA)
keyExams: Inspection/palpation of DIP (Heberden's) and PIP (Bouchard's) nodes

diagnoses.name: Thumb ulnar collateral ligament injury (skier's / gamekeeper's thumb)
diagnoses.source: Magee; thumb MCP UCL sprain diagnostic literature
keyExams: Valgus stress test of the thumb MCP in flexion and extension
Palpation of the ulnar aspect of the thumb MCP
Imaging to exclude an avulsion fracture (Stener lesion)

diagnoses.name: Trigger finger / thumb (stenosing flexor tenosynovitis)
diagnoses.source: Magee; stenosing tenosynovitis (A1 pulley) diagnostic literature
keyExams: Palpation for an A1-pulley nodule / catching on active flexion-extension
Observation of triggering / locking of the digit

diagnoses.name: Dupuytren's contracture (palmar fascia)
keyExams: Palpation of palmar fascia cords / nodules (ring and little finger)

diagnoses.name: Finger sprain / collateral ligament injury (jammed finger)
diagnoses.source: Magee; PIP/DIP sprain and mallet-finger differential
keyExams: Collateral ligament stress test of the affected joint

diagnoses.name: Raynaud's phenomenon (vascular differential)
keyExams: History of triphasic colour change (white-blue-red) with cold
Screen for secondary causes (connective tissue disease) if atypical
